description_long: This is a robust hammer featuring a large, cylindrical metallic head with a smooth, slightly reflective surface. The head is solid and appears to be made of metal, likely steel or iron, with a uniform dark bronze or gunmetal coloration. The handle is straight, made of wood, and is attached centrally to the head, extending downward. The top of the head has a small, rectangular wooden wedge or insert, likely used to secure the handle in place. There are no visible markings, logos, or signs of wear, giving the hammer a pristine and unused appearance. The overall design suggests it is a sledgehammer, suitable for heavy-duty tasks in urban environments such as demolition or construction.
description: A pristine, heavy-duty sledgehammer with a smooth, metallic cylindrical head and a straight wooden handle. The head is dark bronze, and the handle is natural wood with no visible wear or markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad, cylindrical metallic head with a central wooden handle and a small wooden wedge on top.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the rounded end of the hammer head and the straight wooden handle extending downward.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the opposite flat face of the metallic head and the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the rounded end of the head and the handle, similar to view 1.
attribute_handle_type: straight wooden handle, smooth surface, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: cylindrical sledgehammer head, solid metal, flat striking faces on both ends, no claws or peens
